name: Tofu-Vegetable Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Apple juice or white wine
2 Red bell peppers, seeded and chopped
2 Green bell peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Coat an 8-cup casserole dish with vegetable spray.
3. In a heavy pan over medium-high heat, heat juice or wine until simmering; add onion and garlic. Cook, stirring, for 3 minutes.
4. Add zucchini, peppers, and carrots; cover and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add chard, corn, peas, and tofu; cook, uncovered, for 2 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and season with salt, pepper, thyme, and cayenne.
7. Pour into prepared casserole dish.
8. Top with Basic Biscuit Crust.
9. Do not seal edges.
10. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until crust is golden brown. Serves 8.
Per serving: 224 cal; 7 g prot; 4 g fat; 38 g carb; 8 mg chol; 444 mg sod; 4 g fiber; vegan
Vegetarian Times, Nov 93/MM by DEEANNE
